channel.title: Taxed GmbH Blog
channel.description: Expert insights and guides on Swiss taxes for expatriates.

item.title: Eigenmietwert Explained: The Complete Guide to Imputed Rental Value in Switzerland
item.description: A comprehensive guide to Eigenmietwert (imputed rental value) in Switzerland. Learn what it is, how it's calculated, what deductions you can claim, and practical strategies to optimize your tax situation as a Swiss homeowner.
item.dc:creator: Emanuel Flury

item.title: Swiss Tax Return Guide 2025: Complete Step-by-Step Tutorial
item.description: Complete step-by-step guide to filing your Swiss tax return in 2025. Learn about deadlines, required documents, deductions, and the entire tax filing process for expatriates and residents.
item.dc:creator: Emanuel Flury

item.title: Top 10 Tax Deductions for Expats in Switzerland 2025
item.description: Maximize your tax savings in Switzerland! Discover the top 10 tax deductions specifically available to expatriates, including often-missed opportunities that could save you thousands of francs.
item.dc:creator: Patricia

item.title: Swiss Kita Costs and Tax Deductions: Complete Guide for Parents 2025
item.description: Complete guide to Swiss Kita costs and tax deductions for parents. Learn about federal and cantonal regulations, maximum deductions, and practical tips for optimizing your tax situation.
item.dc:creator: Treuhand-Suche

item.title: Swiss Agricultural Tariffs: Can Switzerland Reduce Tariffs for Better USA Trade Deal?
item.description: Understanding Switzerland's agricultural tariff system and its potential impact on USA trade negotiations. Learn about the implications for Swiss farmers, consumers, and food safety standards.
item.dc:creator: SwissInfo

item.title: Switzerland-USA FATCA Agreement: How the Tax Dispute Was Resolved in 2013
item.description: Understanding the historic 2013 Switzerland-USA tax agreement that resolved the banking dispute and implemented FATCA. Learn about the impact on Swiss banks, US taxpayers, and cross-border tax compliance.
item.dc:creator: SwissInfo

item.title: Swiss Eigenmietwert Referendum Approved: What the Property Tax Reform Means for You
item.description: Swiss voters approved the abolition of imputed rental value (Eigenmietwert) on 28 September 2025. Learn what was decided, the implementation timeline, and what it means for your Swiss property taxes.
item.dc:creator: HEV Schweiz

item.title: Retroactive Pillar 3a Contributions: New Opportunities for Swiss Retirement Planning 2025
item.description: Discover the new 2025 rules allowing retroactive Pillar 3a contributions to close contribution gaps. Learn about eligibility, limits, and tax benefits for optimizing your Swiss retirement savings.
item.dc:creator: TREUHAND|SUISSE

item.title: Tax-Deductible Expenses in Switzerland: 2025 Guide for Individuals
item.description: A comprehensive guide to tax-deductible expenses for individuals in Switzerland. Learn about professional expenses, pension contributions, property costs, donations, and expat-specific deductions.
item.dc:creator: Patricia

item.title: Flexible Retirement in Switzerland: Tax Implications and Planning Strategies 2025
item.description: Understanding flexible retirement options in Switzerland and their tax implications. Learn about partial pension withdrawals, tax optimization strategies, and the upcoming 2027 tax changes.
item.dc:creator: Dr. Peter Lang

item.title: Swiss Tax Developments 2025: OECD Minimum Tax Implementation and Corporate Tax Reforms
item.description: Comprehensive analysis of Switzerland's implementation of the OECD minimum tax (Pillar 2), corporate tax rate developments, and their impact on Swiss businesses and international tax planning.
item.dc:creator: Patricia

item.title: Understanding Swiss Tax at Source (Quellensteuer) in 2025
item.description: A comprehensive guide to Swiss tax at source system for expats. Learn who is affected, how it's calculated, and when you might be eligible for a refund.
item.dc:creator: Elena Schmidt

item.title: Cryptocurrency Taxation in Switzerland: Complete Guide 2025
item.description: Everything you need to know about cryptocurrency taxation in Switzerland. Learn how to report crypto gains, losses, and comply with Swiss tax regulations.
item.dc:creator: Michael Chen

item.title: Complete Guide to Pillar 3a Pension for Expats in Switzerland
item.description: Discover how the Pillar 3a pension plan can significantly reduce your Swiss tax bill and help you build wealth for the future. A must-read for any expat.
item.dc:creator: Lukas Weber

item.title: Swiss Wealth Tax: Complete Guide for Expats 2025
item.description: Understand how Swiss wealth tax works, what assets are included, and how to optimize your wealth tax burden as an expat in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Müller

item.title: Navigating Swiss Real Estate Tax for Expats in 2025
item.description: Owning property in Switzerland or abroad has significant tax implications. This guide covers imputed rental value, wealth tax, and deductible costs for expat homeowners.
item.dc:creator: Elena Schmidt

item.title: Expat Tax Planning Strategies for Switzerland 2025
item.description: Strategic tax planning tips for expats in Switzerland. Learn how to minimize your tax burden while staying compliant with Swiss tax laws.
item.dc:creator: David Johnson

item.title: Swiss Business Tax Guide for Expats: Starting a Business in 2025
item.description: Complete guide to Swiss business taxation for expats. Learn about corporate tax rates, VAT, and tax obligations when starting a business in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Anna Weber

item.title: Swiss Inheritance Tax: Complete Guide for Expats 2025
item.description: Understanding Swiss inheritance tax laws and how they affect expats. Learn about tax rates, exemptions, and planning strategies for wealth transfer.
item.dc:creator: Robert Klein

item.title: Swiss Health Insurance Tax Deductions: Maximize Your Savings 2025
item.description: Learn how to maximize your Swiss health insurance tax deductions. Understand what medical expenses are deductible and how to claim them.
item.dc:creator: Maria Garcia

item.title: Swiss Education Tax Benefits for Expats: Save on School Fees 2025
item.description: Discover the tax benefits available for education expenses in Switzerland. Learn how to deduct school fees, language courses, and professional development costs.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Lee
